user_prompt: Consecrate the Skorpius Dunerider before emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the Skorpius Dunerider with mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Anoint its dorsal hull and churning treads with blessed oils before the dire emergency procedure.
Invoke the wrathful Machine Spirit of the Skorpius Dunerider, beseeching unyielding velocity.
Chant the Litany of Deserts as suspensors align for the emergency procedure.
Sanctify the Skorpius Dunerider's cogitators with incense, ensuring the Omnissiah's favor.

Kneel before the manufactorum's forge-heart and intone the Rite of Ablution.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the manufactorum to expel all profane residues during purification.
Scour its conduits with sanctified abrasives, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying fire.
Anoint assembly servos anew as the manufactorum hums in cleansed harmony.
Verify purity through auspex scans, praising the God-Machine's eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: Assist with neutron laser an initialization
prayer:
Present binary incense to the neutron laser's emitter cowling in supplication.
Recite the Canticle of Flux to awaken its Machine Spirit for initialization.
Calibrate focusing gyros with mechadendrite precision during the sacred initialization.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon targeting matrices of the neutron laser.
Conclude with oil-blessed seals, affirming the neutron laser's lethal readiness.

user_prompt: Sanctify the power fist during operation
prayer:
Grasp the power fist's adamantium digits in ritual grip, honoring the Omnissiah.
Chant the Hymn of Crushing Force as disruption fields prime for operation.
Anoint servohydraulics with sacred unguents amidst the power fist's operation.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the power fist to rend the unclean with fury.
Seal the rite with electro-consecration, empowering ceaseless operation.

user_prompt: How do I bless the neutron laser for sterilization?
prayer:
Circumambulate the neutron laser thrice, asperging with ablative myrrh.
Intone the Sterilization Doxology to purify its plasma vents for sterilization.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the neutron laser, demanding aseptic annihilation.
Anoint beam apertures with argent salves during the blessed sterilization.
Affirm sanctity via purity runes, under the Omnissiah's unblinking gaze.

Interface with the data-arc's noospheric port using sanctified electro-plugs.
Recite the Loading Canticle to rouse its Machine Spirit for critical loading.
Sequentially infuse data-canticles into the data-arc's voracious memory vaults.
Monitor flux integrity as the data-arc engorges with Omnissiah-blessed lore.
Seal the data-arc with binaric seals, completing the urgent loading rite.

user_prompt: Urgent neutron laser a startup needed
prayer:
Kindle lumen-orbs around the neutron laser and prostrate in veneration.
Chant the Startup Incantation to ignite its Machine Spirit's plasma heart.
Anoint coolant manifolds prior to the vital startup sequence.
Align gyro-stabilizers with precision cantrips for the neutron laser's awakening.
Praise the Omnissiah as the neutron laser surges to incandescent life.

user_prompt: My arc rifle is ready for loading
prayer:
Elevate the arc rifle skyward, beseeching the Omnissiah's thunderous might.
Intone the Loading Litany to appease its volatile Machine Spirit.
Insert promethium cells with reverent mechadendrites for the loading rite.
Calibrate tesla coils amid crackling auspex feedback during loading.
Consecrate the arc rifle's barrel with sacred sparks, ready for war.

user_prompt: Bless the radar array for charging
prayer:
Encircle the radar array's auspex spires with incense braziers aglow.
Recite the Charging Doxology to invigorate its Machine Spirit.
Infuse power talismans into capacitors for the sacred charging phase.
Monitor waveform purity as the radar array pulses with ethereal vigor.
Invoke the Omnissiah's gaze upon the radar array, piercing veils of void.

user_prompt: Consecrate the Kastelan robot before consecration
prayer:
Prostrate before the Kastelan robot's monolithic frame in humble awe.
Anoint its ceramite plating and data-vaults with oils of consecration.
Awaken the ancient Machine Spirit of the Kastelan robot through binaric hymn.
Prime data-tether protocols in the rite of consecration.
Rise and command the Kastelan robot to march, blessed by the Omnissiah eternal.
